<Badge text="brainstorming" variant="note" /> <Badge text="34 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Agent workflow discipline from `obra/superpowers`. Prompt-only skills with no observed hooks or scripts in source-list output; complements local `orchestrator`, `test-architect`, and `honest-review` without duplicating them.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add obra/superpowers --skill brainstorming --skill systematic-debugging --skill test-driven-development --skill writing-plans --skill executing-plans --skill verification-before-completion -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/brainstorming`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/brainstorming.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add obra/superpowers --skill brainstorming --skill systematic-debugging --skill test-driven-development --skill writing-plans --skill executing-plans --skill verification-before-completion -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Agent workflow discipline from `obra/superpowers`. Prompt-only skills with no observed hooks or scripts in source-list output; complements local `orchestrator`, `test-architect`, and `honest-review` without duplicating them.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Refines rough ideas through questions, explores alternatives, presents design in sections for validation. Saves design document. Part of obra/superpowers agentic skills framework & software development methodology. Prompt-only skills (no observed hooks/scripts in source-list); composable workflow: brainstorming -&gt; writing-plans -&gt; executing-plans + test-driven-development + verification-before-completion. Complements local orchestrator/test-architect/honest-review.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add obra/superpowers --skill brainstorming --skill systematic-debugging --skill test-driven-development --skill writing-plans --skill executing-plans --skill verification-before-completion -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers) (MIT, highly active)

## Comparable Alternatives

Local planning/debug/review skills; github/awesome-copilot planning skills; other TDD/methodology bundles.

&gt; Web-aug from README + skills/ 2026. Evidence only.
